name: Python Lint Fix
description: Environment health checks and pre-commit setup guidance for Python and Markdown quality automation.
author: kimcharli

commands.name: lint
commands.description: Check environment health and guide pre-commit setup

features: Pre-commit setup guidance for commit-time quality automation
Environment health checks for uv, pre-commit, and hook installation
Project policy checks for .pre-commit-config.yaml and markdownlint version
Skill validation support via validate-skill.sh detection
Actionable remediation hints for missing tools
